column1: There's _____ in my soup. It's a mosquito.
I have _____ to read this night. So I am going to watch TV.
He looked at me and didn't say _____ .
Let me see your pictures. If there's _____ , I'll buy it.
She said _____ but I didn't understand it.
"How much does it cost to visit the museum?" - "_____ . It's free".
He felt terrible. He couldn't do _____ else.
I've had a terrible day. _____ went wrong.
